title: taraxacum unciferum
intro: Taraxacum unciferum, also known as the lesser dandelion, is a plant species within the dandelion genus, characterized by its smaller size and distinctive leaf shape compared to the more common dandelion. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high levels of taraxasterol, which has been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum unciferum include its potential to support liver function, reduce inflammation, and improve digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Taraxacum unciferum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, allowing for various herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
